description_long: This object is a detailed model of the Roman Colosseum, an iconic ancient amphitheater known for its massive, elliptical structure and multiple tiers of arched openings. The exterior features three levels of evenly spaced arches, each supported by columns, and the uppermost level is partially ruined, revealing the interior. The interior shows the stepped seating arrangement and the central arena, with the partial collapse of the outer wall exposing the cross-section of the structure. The model sits on a rectangular base that represents the ground or plaza surrounding the monument. The color is a uniform light brown, mimicking the travertine stone used in the original construction. The overall appearance is weathered and monumental, capturing the grandeur and historical significance of the Colosseum.
description: A detailed, light brown model of the Roman Colosseum with arched tiers, partial ruins, and a visible stepped interior, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intact curved facade with three levels of arches and the open arena inside.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the partially collapsed wall, exposing the interior seating and arena structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the open arena and the symmetrical arrangement of arches.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view highlighting the broken section of the wall and the stepped seating inside.
